dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} has not been the same lately, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin}, their behavior has been deteriorating and no one can reach them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: At first it was just odd habits. Now they have barricaded themselves away, raving about things no one else can see. {quest_ally} tried to help but was driven off. Something at the {quest_focus} is pulling them deeper.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to get to the source and find out what is doing this. Can you help {quest_time_pressure} before the {quest_threat} consumes them entirely?

dialogueChunks.intro: Half the settlement has been afflicted, {player_name}. The {quest_focus} struck without warning, and the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} spreading faster than we can understand.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is one of the affected. They describe identical visions across every victim. This is not coincidence: something near {location_hint} is projecting this. Even the {enemy_type} in the area have been behaving erratically.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are terrified. We need to find what is causing the {quest_threat} and put an end to it before the whole settlement falls apart.

dialogueChunks.intro: Several of our people have lost themselves, {player_name}. They fled into the wilds near {location_hint}, unable to recognize anyone. It happened overnight.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} examined what they had been exposed to and found traces of something unnatural: {quest_item} residue that should not be there. {target_npc} thinks a cure is possible, but needs samples from the contamination site.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} still out there, lost to the {quest_threat}. Find the source and bring back what {target_npc} needs. {quest_reward_hint} awaits if you succeed.
